title: Initial build of Makeshift Moguls app

requirements.text: Create a Motoko backend actor with a basic data model suitable for a business/mogul-themed platform. Include at minimum: a persistent store for named entities (e.g., players or users with a name and score), and query/update functions to create, read, and list them.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor compiles and deploys successfully.
Functions to create an entry, retrieve it by ID, and list all entries are available and callable.

requirements.text: Build a React frontend for Makeshift Moguls that connects to the backend canister. The app should display a list of entities (e.g., moguls/players), allow adding a new entry with a name, and show each entry's name and score.
acceptanceCriteria: The home page renders a list of existing entries fetched from the backend.
A form allows the user to submit a new entry name, which persists to the backend.
The list updates after a new entry is added.
No console errors during normal usage.

requirements.text: Apply a bold, industrial tycoon visual theme across the entire frontend. Use a dark charcoal and gold color palette with strong typography, gritty textures or subtle geometric patterns, and a confident layout that feels like a deal-making mogul empire. Enforce this style consistently across all pages and components.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share the same dark-charcoal-and-gold color scheme.
Typography is bold and large for headings, with clear hierarchy.
No default browser or generic light-mode styling is visible.

constraints: All Motoko logic must reside in a single actor in backend/main.mo.
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Third-party authentication (only Internet Identity if auth is needed).

required: Dark industrial banner with bold gold lettering and a gritty texture background, suitable for a tycoon-themed app header (makeshift-moguls-banner.dim_1200x300.png)
Gold coin stack icon illustration on a dark background (mogul-coin-icon.dim_128x128.png)
